sections.paragraph: ϰαταφρονέω [κατά, φρονέω] ‘look down on’, despise, disdain, scorn Mt 6:24; 18:10; 1 Cor 11:22; 1 Ti 4:12; 2 Pt 2:10; Tit 2:15 v.l.; pay no attention to, disregard Lk 16:13; think less of 1 Ti 6:2; of displaying ungracious response to generosity make light of Ro 2:4. By ext., of disdain for personal hazard take no account of Hb 12:2.
